results.narrative: Fresh blood visible in droppings, otherwise healthy-looking flock
results.rationale: One or more emergency triggers matched.

results.narrative: Orange mucus / sloughed intestinal tissue observed
triggers: Orange mucus or sloughed intestinal tissue
results.rationale: One or more emergency triggers matched.

results.narrative: Sudden mortality spike with no other major signs
results.rationale: One or more emergency triggers matched.

results.narrative: Severe diarrhea + widespread hunched posture
supporting_signs: Birds hunched with ruffled feathers (widespread)
triggers: Severe diarrhea WITH widespread hunched posture / ruffled feathers
results.rationale: One or more emergency triggers matched.

results.narrative: Severe diarrhea + significant feed drop
supporting_signs: Feed intake below expected growth curve
triggers: Severe diarrhea WITH significant drop in feed intake
results.rationale: One or more emergency triggers matched.

results.narrative: Severe diarrhea + paleness
supporting_signs: Noticeable paleness or depigmentation
results.rationale: One or more emergency triggers matched.

results.narrative: Severe diarrhea + widespread huddling
supporting_signs: Birds huddling despite adequate ambient temperature
results.rationale: One or more emergency triggers matched.

results.narrative: Severe diarrhea + significant water drop
supporting_signs: Water consumption dropped below normal
triggers: Severe diarrhea WITH significant drop in water consumption
results.rationale: One or more emergency triggers matched.

results.narrative: Multiple emergency signs (blood + spike + severe diarrhea)
supporting_signs: Noticeable paleness or depigmentation
results.rationale: One or more emergency triggers matched.

results.narrative: Severe diarrhea + leaking drinkers (no emergency systemic signs)
supporting_signs: Misaligned / leaking drinkers creating wet spots
results.rationale: Rule matched: Severe diarrhea + ≥1 supporting sign (1 signs present, threshold 1).

results.narrative: Severe diarrhea + damp litter only
supporting_signs: Litter damp or heavily caked and wet
results.rationale: Rule matched: Severe diarrhea + ≥1 supporting sign (1 signs present, threshold 1).

results.narrative: Severe diarrhea + slight (not significant) feed drop
supporting_signs: Feed intake below expected growth curve
results.rationale: Rule matched: Severe diarrhea + ≥1 supporting sign (1 signs present, threshold 1).

results.narrative: Loose droppings + damp litter + leaking drinkers
supporting_signs: Litter damp or heavily caked and wet
Misaligned / leaking drinkers creating wet spots
results.rationale: Rule matched: Loose droppings + ≥2 supporting signs (2 signs present, threshold 2).

results.narrative: Loose droppings + gradual mortality + feed drop
supporting_signs: Feed intake below expected growth curve
Daily mortality gradually rising above baseline
results.rationale: Rule matched: Loose droppings + ≥2 supporting signs (2 signs present, threshold 2).

results.narrative: Loose droppings + widespread hunched + huddling
supporting_signs: Birds hunched with ruffled feathers (widespread)
Birds huddling despite adequate ambient temperature
results.rationale: Rule matched: Loose droppings + ≥2 supporting signs (2 signs present, threshold 2).

results.narrative: Loose droppings + young chicks unvaccinated (immune-naive risk)
supporting_signs: Flock is < 3 weeks old (immune naivety)
Coccidiosis vaccination absent / unknown
results.rationale: Rule matched: Loose droppings + ≥2 supporting signs (2 signs present, threshold 2).

results.narrative: Normal droppings + 3 wet-environment signs
supporting_signs: Flock is < 3 weeks old (immune naivety)
Litter damp or heavily caked and wet
Misaligned / leaking drinkers creating wet spots
results.rationale: Rule matched: Normal droppings + ≥3 supporting signs (3 signs present, threshold 3).

results.narrative: Normal droppings + 3 management gaps
supporting_signs: Coccidiosis vaccination absent / unknown
Not on dietary coccidiostat program
Litter damp or heavily caked and wet
results.rationale: Rule matched: Normal droppings + ≥3 supporting signs (3 signs present, threshold 3).

results.narrative: Normal droppings + 4 signs incl. gradual mortality
supporting_signs: Flock is < 3 weeks old (immune naivety)
Not on dietary coccidiostat program
Daily mortality gradually rising above baseline
Litter damp or heavily caked and wet
results.rationale: Rule matched: Normal droppings + ≥3 supporting signs (4 signs present, threshold 3).

results.narrative: Completely healthy flock
results.rationale: Below Act-now threshold: 0 supporting signs vs threshold 3 (Normal droppings pathway).

results.narrative: Loose droppings + only 1 supporting sign (below threshold of 2)
supporting_signs: Litter damp or heavily caked and wet
results.rationale: Below Act-now threshold: 1 supporting signs vs threshold 2 (Loose droppings pathway).

results.narrative: Normal droppings + 2 supporting signs (below threshold of 3)
supporting_signs: Not on dietary coccidiostat program
Litter damp or heavily caked and wet
results.rationale: Below Act-now threshold: 2 supporting signs vs threshold 3 (Normal droppings pathway).

results.narrative: Isolated hunched posture only (doesn't count as widespread sign)
results.rationale: Below Act-now threshold: 0 supporting signs vs threshold 3 (Normal droppings pathway).

results.narrative: Slight water drop only — single sign, not enough
supporting_signs: Water consumption dropped below normal
results.rationale: Below Act-now threshold: 1 supporting signs vs threshold 3 (Normal droppings pathway).

results.narrative: Loose + exactly 2 signs (at threshold)
supporting_signs: Not on dietary coccidiostat program
Litter damp or heavily caked and wet
results.rationale: Rule matched: Loose droppings + ≥2 supporting signs (2 signs present, threshold 2).

results.narrative: Normal + exactly 3 signs (at threshold)
supporting_signs: Coccidiosis vaccination absent / unknown
Not on dietary coccidiostat program
Litter damp or heavily caked and wet
results.rationale: Rule matched: Normal droppings + ≥3 supporting signs (3 signs present, threshold 3).

results.narrative: Severe diarrhea + zero other signs — should NOT escalate to Emergency, but should still Act Now (severe diarrhea + 1 supporting sign needs 1)
results.rationale: Below Act-now threshold: 0 supporting signs vs threshold 1 (Severe diarrhea pathway).

results.narrative: Older flock, vaccinated, healthy environment, mild paleness only
supporting_signs: Noticeable paleness or depigmentation
results.rationale: Below Act-now threshold: 1 supporting signs vs threshold 3 (Normal droppings pathway).

results.narrative: Young chicks, unvaccinated, dry well-managed environment

Coccidiosis vaccination absent / unknown
Not on dietary coccidiostat program

results.narrative: Loose droppings + 1 other sign — depends on loose_double_count
supporting_signs: Litter damp or heavily caked and wet
results.rationale: Below Act-now threshold: 1 supporting signs vs threshold 2 (Loose droppings pathway).

results.narrative: Older vaccinated flock with 3 management-only signs — tests age/vacc gate
supporting_signs: Not on dietary coccidiostat program
Litter damp or heavily caked and wet
Misaligned / leaking drinkers creating wet spots
results.rationale: Rule matched: Normal droppings + ≥3 supporting signs (3 signs present, threshold 3).
